firmware.title: 11.0.15.17.KB09CB is available
firmware.description:
New version: 11.0.15.17.KB09CB

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Android security patch upgraded to February 2022

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 12AM and 6AM starting March 2nd, 2022. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

firmware.title: KB2007_14.0.0.300(EX01) is available
firmware.description:
New Version Available: KB2007_14.0.0.300(EX01) 

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

Release Highlights:

• Upgrade to Android OS U.

• Android security patch updated to January 5, 2024.

• General bug fixes.

 Automatic Update Schedule:

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2 AM and 6 AM starting on March 27th, 2024.

Note:

Data rates may apply.

Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
